creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Does this happen with nda?  nda will retry these things w/o failing them up the tree and so zfs won't have problems. Perhaps nvme should just retry these I/Os a small number of times instead?

As for the nvme controller, I'm not sure much can be done: We're detecting that we've stopped getting interrupts from it, we check the status and find that the nvme controller has failed and we have to reset the controller to keep going.
